briefdescription.para: A delegate to handle specified HTTP status code when the HTTP request succeeded and then will return a task state as the next command for the scheduler to do various things on the task that track the HTTP request.

listitem.para: Completed, CancelledUAccelByteBlueprintsCredentials and Failed state will finish the task
Running, Pending and Retrying state will retry the task
Paused state will pause the task

parameterdescription.para: The HTTP status code that will be handled

memberdef.argsstring: (FHttpRequestPtr Request, TSharedPtr< FJsonObject > Content, const FHttpRequestCompleteDelegate &CompleteDelegate, double RequestTime, bool bOmitBlankValues=false)=0
memberdef.name: ProcessRequest
